generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraFeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor providing real-time telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing real-time telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraFeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Camera feed data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraFeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilteringEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilteringEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storage for vehicle state and object track timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted, LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage for vehicle state and object track timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for node lifecycle management"
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeUIDisplayInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSystemExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Timeseries analysis of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationAction
]

instance RealTimeUIDisplayInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI display of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for driver transparency"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object track timeseries data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating timeseries analysis reports for vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCSystemExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executing ACC system logic on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of object tracks and driving path"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for speed control via voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis (steering/speed control)"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis (autonomy platform)"
]

instance AutonomyComponents : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy components"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for vehicle simulation and data processing"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for human-in-the-loop interaction"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration with other systems"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, AutonomyComponents, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance UserEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity
]

instance CrossSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Motor voltage commands for speed control, steering servo commands for direction, and emergency braking signals generated by ACC Controlling FE and Actuation FE to actuate the physical vehicle in response to remote management commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with maximum 100 ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components to ensure event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross-System) with ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, and Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and compliance validation, and during operation for optimization and health monitoring; represents the 'as operated' phase of the physical vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-entity communication via ROS2 network; inter-entity communication over Wi-Fi using OPC Unified Architecture (UA) for Data Translation FE per ISO 23247 standard."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) and User Entity hosted in cloud for computation offloading; Data Storage external to vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
